name: Hillary Clinton
subject: A dangerous trend for women's health
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Stand with women: | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI2NDY5NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxMjYzNDQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend --

With today's vote to restrict a woman's right to make her own health care decisions, Republicans in Congress have made it abundantly clear where their priorities lie:

Instead of helping everyday Americans and their families, these politicians are trying to take women back more than 40 years.

**[**I'll stand up for women and our right to access reproductive health care. Will you join me?**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI2NDY5NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxMjYzNDQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

This bill puts women's health and rights at risk. It undermines the role doctors play in personal health care decisions, and it burdens survivors of sexual assault.

It also follows a dangerous trend we are witnessing across the country. In just the first three months of 2015, more than 300 bills have been introduced in state legislatures -- on top of the nearly 30 introduced in Congress -- that restrict access to abortion.

Republicans won't lift a finger to ensure paid family leave or increase access to quality childcare, but apparently they'll waste time and taxpayer money to try and get between a woman and her doctor.

I've stood up for women and families my entire career. Safeguarding women's reproductive health and rights is critical and deeply connected to building stronger families and a stronger America.

**Add your name if you'll take on this fight with me:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/reproductive-health/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI2NDY5NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxMjYzNDQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
**
Thank you for joining me,

Hillary [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI2NDY5NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxMjYzNDQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI2NDY5NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxMjYzNDQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0).
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI2NDY5NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxMjYzNDQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

This bill puts women's health and rights at risk. It undermines the role doctors play in personal health care decisions, and it burdens survivors of sexual assault. It also follows a dangerous trend we are witnessing across the country. In just the first three months of 2015, more than 300 bills have been introduced in state legislatures -- on top of the nearly 30 introduced in Congress -- that restrict access to abortion. Republicans won't lift a finger to ensure paid family leave or increase access to quality childcare, but apparently they'll waste time and taxpayer money to try and get between a woman and her doctor. I've stood up for women and families my entire career. Safeguarding women's reproductive health and rights is critical and deeply connected to building stronger families and a stronger America. Add your name if you'll take on this fight with me: Thank you for joining me, Hillary | | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

name: Barry Bennett, Carson America
subject: NEW POLL: Carson tied for first
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27760164:26691075469:m:1:876315805:550B80152635FDF7C4DC84C17418B020:r)
---
|

Peter,

**A brand new Fox News poll released last night has Dr. Carson tied for first in the race for the Republican Presidential nomination.

**Yes, it's still very early and there's a long, hard road ahead -- but this is huge news and we should all feel very encouraged. And making it even better, this poll comes right on the heels of Carson America crossing 100,000 donations.

If you look a bit deeper into this new poll, there are also some other very encouraging signs for Ben and our campaign.

For example, 82 percent of those polled believe that we need to recruit and support more candidates for office who are ordinary citizens rather than professional politicians and lawyers. And 85 percent believe that political leaders are more interested in protecting their power and privilege than doing what is right for the American people.

**In other words, the American people are fed up with the political class in both parties.**

I believe they're ready for a new type of candidate who cares more about the next generation than the next election, which is exactly what Ben brings to the table.

**I also believe this -- you deserve a lot of the thanks for this great news. Your ongoing participation and support is what drives this campaign, and it means a great deal.

**[**To help keep this momentum going, I ask you to consider making a donation**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27760164:26691075469:m:1:876315805:550B80152635FDF7C4DC84C17418B020:r), or asking a friend to visit and sign up at [BenCarson.com](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27760165:26691075469:m:1:876315805:550B80152635FDF7C4DC84C17418B020:r).

Thank you so much, now let's keep moving forward.

Sincerely, Barry Bennett
Campaign Manager
Carson America
---
| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27760164:26691075469:m:1:876315805:550B80152635FDF7C4DC84C17418B020:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27760166:26691075469:m:1:876315805:550B80152635FDF7C4DC84C17418B020:r)
---
|

name: Senator Lindsey Graham
subject: FWD: If I run -- I will run to win
body:
Friend, did you see the email I sent this week? **[Can you help?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27770653:26700847304:m:1:877327319:AF851AE703728BBA5B42865AA309FB4B:r)**

Thanks so much.

\- Lindsey

| |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

I recently established a "testing the waters" committee called **Security Through Strength** to fund my travels around the country so I can listen to Americans and gauge support for a potential presidential campaign.

Today, Friend, as one of my key supporters, I am turning to you for help. Before I make my final decision about a White House run, I need to know that you are with me.

To that end, **[I am asking you to please make a generous contribution to Security Through Strength today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27770653:26700847304:m:1:877327319:AF851AE703728BBA5B42865AA309FB4B:r)**.

Senator Lindsey Graham

P.S. In today's perilous world, **we must keep our country secure and protect the American Dream**. We owe it to our children and grandchildren to do no less.

Friend, if I decide to run for the Republican nomination for President, **I will run to win**. Today, I am asking you to support my "testing the waters" activities as I explore a potential candidacy. I hope you will stand with me in this important effort **[by making a contribution of $25, $50 $100, or whatever you can afford today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27770653:26700847304:m:1:877327319:AF851AE703728BBA5B42865AA309FB4B:r)**. Thanks, Lindsey

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27770653:26700847304:m:1:877327319:AF851AE703728BBA5B42865AA309FB4B:r) |

_Security Through Strength is a 527 political organization registered with the Internal Revenue Service._

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information
[click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/is7txZv1Nj).
[Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os7txZv1Nj) | [Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os7txZv1Nj)

Peter -

Did you see Governor Walker's message from yesterday? [Please consider becoming a member today.](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI2NTE0MjYS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYxMzI0Nzg5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

With your help, we can fight for big, big reforms.

Rick Wiley
Our American Revival

**Begin forwarded message:**
**From:** Governor Scott Walker
**Subject:** Don't miss out
**Date:** May 12, 2015
****
**
******
Peter,

Our records show that you still have not become a Charter Member. Will you join now?
[_RED MEMBERSHIP >>>_](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI2NTE0MjYS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYxMzI0Nzg5S0&mt=1&rt=0) | [_WHITE MEMBERSHIP >>>_](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI2NTE0MjYS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYxMzI0Nzg5S0&mt=1&rt=0) | [BLUE MEMBERSHIP >>>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI2NTE0MjYS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYxMzI0Nzg5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---|---|---

At Our American Revival we are focused on building an America that is most responsive to the taxpayer as possible. We know that you hold the power, not government bureaucrats. We work every day for big, bold reforms, like the ones I instituted in Wisconsin. [Will you join us in this fight by becoming a Charter Member?](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI2NTE0MjYS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYxMzI0Nzg5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you,

Governor Scott Walker
